intent: An editorial blog landing page — masthead, three article cards, simple footer. Quiet, considered typography is essential; this brand is built on calm reading rhythm.
features: header with site name in Lora
notes: Critical: this brand's voice IS its typography. Lora for headings, Inter for body. The palette is forest-green editorial — already deliberately picked. If typography misses, the page reads as generic SaaS regardless of palette.
